description: Fungal type generation and per-type dimension/rate formulas. Transcribed from generation-tables.ts (FUNGAL_TYPE_TABLE, DIMENSION_FORMULAS, BIOLUMINESCENCE_TABLE, TRANSPARENCY_TABLE) and RULES-SPEC.md sections 2, 5, 7. Dice formulas are strings evaluated by the engine's seeded roller. Rates are given with their native unit; the engine converts to days via time.ts toDays() at generation. See docs/02-Design-Decisions.md D5 (month=30), D11 (shelf cap geometry: 2d10 governs), D18 (bioluminescence rarity).

shape.growth: stem grows straight up into a cap wider than the base

shape.base: cap grows directly out of the shell as a horizontal semicircle
shape.growth: base length = cap diameter; height = cap radius

shape.base: grows straight up, uniform width base-to-top

mold.notes: Default opaque (transparency not rolled) unless a poison special product forces transparency. Begins RTFM with only 1 mycelium unit + shade; fully matured only at MRUOM; harvestable area = MRUOM. Produces 1 spore/MES per growth regardless of size.

shape.growth: stem grows straight up into a cap wider than the base

mushroom.notes: Always edible; no function roll (see functions.json). No transparency-forced exceptions.

rounding.optimumTraditionalCapRadius: volva radius added, not independently rolled

appearance.note: Bioluminescence and Transparency are per-growth appearance rolls (RULES-SPEC.md section 7) that have no dedicated data file; they live here alongside type generation. Color and pattern have their own files (colors.json, patterns.json).

bioluminescence.description: Only exact multiples of 25 are bioluminescent (4% total). Normalized from four thesis sub-bands. See D18 — kept intentionally rare, not a typo.

transparency.description: Mold is opaque by default (not rolled). Poison special product 'Makes Essence Of Ether' can force transparency regardless (see functions.json).
